title: Merch Authentic Cel
wikitext:
[]: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by marebound » Fri Sep 08, 2017 6:45 pm Howdy! I made an account here hoping to get some advice. I've been trying to decide if these production cels are authentic. I've never bought any type of animation cel and I could use a little guidance. I'm a big fan of animator Mitsuo Iso, so I was hoping to find a legit cel from the fight between Asuka and the Mass Produced Evas. I've done some research and I know finding cels from the show is next to impossible, but can the same be said for EoE? http://www.ebay.com/itm/Asuka-Langley-Sohryu-Evangelion-original-Production-anime-cel-RARE-/122039286428?hash=item1c6a1bba9c:g:3BEAAOSwy5ZXDKLY This ebay seller is selling a couple cels from the scene, but I could really use some outside opinions. Has anyone bought stuff from this seller? What sort of thing should I be looking for that could indicate whether this is authentic or not? It seems like each frame # above is noticeably different, should that be a concern? And if there are any good questions I could shoot the seller please lemme know. https://asylum-anime.com/store/index.php/featured/eva-53-evangelion-movie-anime-cel.html This last site was a recommendation I went to on a whim but they have some pretty neat cels. I've never heard of "Asylum Anime" and I can't find a lot of reviews from them. I really love this frame despite the obvious wear it has. Any thoughts? I'd really appreciate any help!! I really want to get my grubby little hands on some legit Eva shit, it would mean a lot to me.

[]: Re: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Sep 09, 2017 11:15 am I can't tell you if the cells are the real thing but I have brought trading cards, game cards and special cards from this e-bay seller and they were all the real deal. found an old Eva thread from the forum here and Eva monkey it might be useful as well, http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7053/Eva-art-cells-/ http://www.evamonkey.com/want-to-buy-an-evangelion-animation-cel/

[]: Re: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by marebound » Sun Sep 10, 2017 5:15 pm Alright, at least somebody knows em! Thanks for letting me know, it does make me feel quite a bit better. I took a look at the Eva Monkey post a bit ago and it's basically where I got most of my information from, but that Eva thread is new to me, thanks for sending it!!

[]: Re: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 15, 2017 6:04 pm I've bought from Asylum Anime before. The Asuka cell I bought back in May came from their booth at Animazement. I laid eyes on the cel pictured in their link you posted, and decided that $400 had to be my cutoff point that weekend. The ebay link looks legit as well, but that's just judging from the online picture. Can't be sure.

[]: Re: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by Mainblag » Mon Oct 09, 2017 12:14 pm Holy shit, I need one of these.

[]: Re: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Oct 26, 2017 3:25 pm Noticed that the ebay seller syuju017 and Anime Asylum have cels from the same scene, at 2 different price points: https://www.ebay.com/itm/Ayanami-Rei-Mi ... 2707124799 - $195; actually a dual layer (Rei and Misato) https://asylum-anime.com/store/index.ph ... e-cel.html - $300; also looks like a dual layer too, could be stuck. Also, syuju017 is selling this cel for $100. I have one from the same sequence ( http://coldsteel.rubberslug.com/gallery ... mID=393187 ) that I picked up in Japan for ¥8,000, to provide a cost comparison.

[]: (Merch) Authentic Cel?             Quote Post by marebound » Fri Sep 08, 2017 6:45 pm Howdy! I made an account here hoping to get some advice. I've been trying to decide if these production cels are authentic. I've never bought any type of animation cel and I could use a little guidance. I'm a big fan of animator Mitsuo Iso, so I was hoping to find a legit cel from the fight between Asuka and the Mass Produced Evas. I've done some research and I know finding cels from the show is next to impossible, but can the same be said for EoE? http://www.ebay.com/itm/Asuka-Langley-Sohryu-Evangelion-original-Production-anime-cel-RARE-/122039286428?hash=item1c6a1bba9c:g:3BEAAOSwy5ZXDKLY This ebay seller is selling a couple cels from the scene, but I could really use some outside opinions. Has anyone bought stuff from this seller? What sort of thing should I be looking for that could indicate whether this is authentic or not? It seems like each frame # above is noticeably different, should that be a concern? And if there are any good questions I could shoot the seller please lemme know. https://asylum-anime.com/store/index.php/featured/eva-53-evangelion-movie-anime-cel.html This last site was a recommendation I went to on a whim but they have some pretty neat cels. I've never heard of "Asylum Anime" and I can't find a lot of reviews from them. I really love this frame despite the obvious wear it has. Any thoughts? I'd really appreciate any help!! I really want to get my grubby little hands on some legit Eva shit, it would mean a lot to me.
